word: G352 - ἀνακύπτω - anakýptō - an-ak-oop'-to - Lift up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνακύπτω

- Transliteration: Anakupto

- Phonetic: an-ak-oop'-to

- Definition:

1. to raise or lift one's self up

a. one's body

b. one's soul

1. to be elated or exalted

- Origin: from G303 (in the sense of reversal) and G2955

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 (in the sense of reversal) and G2955; to unbend that is rise; figuratively be elated: - lift up look up.
